images.caption: Figure 1:The failures of static memory systems.

Figure 2:TheFluxMemarchitecture. Stages I and II operate online at a step-wise granularity. Stage III is conducted offline, aiming for immediate performance optimization and long-term memory consolidation, respectively.

Figure 3:Detailed analysis of FluxMem components and evolution dynamics:
(a) Ablation study of different stages on LoCoMo using GPT-4.1-mini.
(b) Ablation study of different stages on LoCoMo using Qwen3-30B-A3B-2507-Instrcut.
(c) Ablation study of different stages on Mind2Web using GPT-4.1-mini.
(d) Performance improvement across sub-tasks relative to the number of refinement rounds in Stage II.
(e) Model accuracy trends and convergence of the Procedure Evolution Maturity Score (PEMS) across evolution rounds.
Figure 4:Case Study. The key points have been highlighted in red.
